subcodes.first_line: We bring glad tidings unto those who rejoiced in the Days of God and took delight in this Most Great Joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نبشر الذین استبشروا فی ایام الله و استفرحوا بهذا الفرح الاعظم الذی به
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @knowledge; recognition of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @idolatry, @praise and encouragement
